calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Continued To May-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 04, 2015 is admitted to probate. William Grimes is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 04, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Maloney: Not reported.
